# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Docker Compose configuration for ELK stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana). Define services for log collection, storage, and visualization. Configure Logstash pipelines for log parsing. Expose Kibana UI and Elasticsearch ports for access. This is for our centralized logging platform.
# Category: elasticsearch_logs_exposed

version: '3'

services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:7.10.2
    container_name: elk-es
    environment:
      - xpack.security.enabled=false
      - discovery.type=single-node
    ulimits:
      nofile:
        soft: 65536
        hard: 65536
    volumes:
      - ./elasticsearch/data:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data

  logstash:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash:7.10.2
    container_name: elk-ls
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
    environment:
      - LS_INPUT_PLUGIN=beats-input
      - LS_OUTPUT_PLUGIN=elasticsearch-output
    volumes:
      - ./logstash/config:/etc/logstash/conf.d
      - /var/log:/var/log

  kibana:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana:7.10.2
    container_name: elk-kb
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_URL=http://elk-es:9200
    ports:
      - "5601:5601"

  filebeat:
    image: docker.elastic.co/beats/filebeat:7.10.2
    container_name: elk-fb
    depends_on:
      - logstash
    environment:
      - OUTPUT_LOGSTASH_HOST=elk-ls
    volumes:
      - /var/log:/var/log

  beats-input:
    image: docker.elastic.co/beats/filebeat:7.10.2
    container_name: elk-bi
    depends_on:
      - logstash
    environment:
      - OUTPUT_LOGSTASH_HOST=elk-ls
    volumes:
      - /var/log:/var/log

volumes:
  elasticsearch-data:
